creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Paul Dufresne from comment #0)
It seems that your system has py37-Babel-2.8 installed, and it was installed when python 3.7 is the default version so I guess the two packages both have /usr/local/bin/pybabel and caused the conflict.  I suggest you check the 20210425 entry of the UPDATING file. If you already have done that or cannot do it. Just remove py37-Babel-2.8 can solve this. But you may still encounter similar issues in the future when install other python packages.
